description.p: ROS-Industrial support for the Motoman ES series (and variants).
This package contains configuration data, 3D models and launch files for Motoman ES manipulators. This currently includes the ES165RD-II.

Joint limits and max joint velocities are based on the information found in:
MOTOMAN-ES165RD II INSTRUCTIONS (HW1482721), version 170336-1CD, rev 2.
MOTOMAN-ES165RD INSTRUCTIONS (HW0485719), version 156827-1CD, rev 7.
MOTOMAN-ES165RD INSTRUCTIONS (HW0482145), version 149538-1CD, rev 3.
MOTOMAN-ES200RN-120 INSTRUCTIONS (HW0482571), version 151533-1CD, rev 1.
All URDFs / XACROs are based on the default motion and joint velocity limits, unless noted otherwise (ie: no support for high speed joints, extended / limited motion ranges or other options).
Before using any of the configuration files and / or meshes included in this package, be sure to check they are correct for the particular robot model and configuration you intend to use them with.
